generated_exposure.exposure_text: Our allies are taking advantage of us. While we maintain our defenses, they're cutting budgets and leaving us exposed. Remember when NATO partners failed to meet spending targets? That's not partnership—that's free-riding. We can't afford to be the world's security guarantor while others shirk their responsibilities. Time to put America first and demand real commitment from our allies. #NationalSecurity #AllianceBurden
